title: gentiana lutea subsp. montserratii
intro: Gentiana lutea subsp. montserratii is a subspecies of the Yellow Gentian plant, a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally, the roots of this plant have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Gentiana lutea subsp. montserratii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Gentiana lutea subsp. montserratii is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies, such as cough syrups and digestive bitters.
